text: Why did Hugh's diet not work?
zh: 为什么休的减肥计划没有成功?

text: My friend, Hugh, has always been fat,
zh: 我的朋友休一直都很胖,

text: but things got so bad recently that he decided to go on a diet.
zh: 但最近情况变得非常糟糕,于是他决定开始节食。

text: He began his diet a week ago.
zh: 他一周前开始了他的节食计划。

text: First of all, he wrote out a long list of all the foods which were forbidden.
zh: 首先,他列出了一张长长的清单,上面写着所有被禁止食用的食物。

text: The list included most of the things Hugh loves:
zh: 这张清单包括了休最喜欢的大部分食物:

text: butter, potatoes, rice, beer, milk, chocolate, and sweets.
zh: 黄油、土豆、米饭、啤酒、牛奶、巧克力和糖果。

text: Yesterday I paid him a visit.
I rang the bell and was not surprised to see that Hugh was still as fat as ever.
zh: 我按了门铃,看到休还是一如既往地胖,并不感到惊讶。

text: He led me into his room and hurriedly hid a large parcel under his desk.
zh: 他把我带进他的房间,匆忙把一个大包裹藏到了书桌底下。

text: It was obvious that he was very embarrassed.
When I asked him what he was doing,
he smiled guiltily and then put the parcel on the desk.
zh: 他有些心虚地笑了笑,然后把包裹放到了书桌上。

text: He explained that his diet was so strict that he had to reward himself occasionally.
zh: 他解释说他的节食计划太严格了,所以他偶尔得奖励一下自己。

text: Then he showed me the contents of the parcel.
zh: 然后他给我看了包裹里的东西。

text: It contained five large bars of chocolate and three bags of sweets!
zh: 里面装着五大块巧克力和三袋糖果!
